parents.subject: LU-17402 kernel: update dotdot patch path for RHEL 8.10

commit.subject: LU-17959 ldlm: lock match should return matched lock's mode
commit.message:
LU-17959 ldlm: lock match should return matched lock's mode

Lock match should return matched lock's mode instead of the mode
argument passed by caller, it could be a set of modes caller trying
to match.

Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I80ff774bdba84b347594bcdfb4358f520914c13a
